headline: Lowe’s (LOW) Isn’t as Bad as People Think, Says Jim Cramer
summary: We recently published Jim Cramer Took A Side On Biggest AI Debate & Discussed These 13 Stocks. Lowe’s Companies, Inc. (NYSE:LOW) is one of the stocks discussed by Jim Cramer. headline: Retailers look to bridge the K-shaped economy with dual playbooks of price cuts and premiumization
summary: As the K-shaped economy continues to divide Americans, retailers are courting lower-income customers with lower prices while catering to more affluent customers with premium offerings.
